All Classes

Class Description
AbstractACNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode>
The AbstractACNodeFactory defines the interface NodeFactories need to implement in order to create suffix trie nodes that may be used in the AhoCorasickStringMatcher DFA.
ACTrieNode
The basic Aho-Corasick supporting Trie Node - It keeps track of all transitions, failure paths and can be used to create a DFA.
ACTrieNodeFactory
The default ACTrieNodeFactory which generates standard ACTrieNodes.
AhoCorasickTrie<nodeType extends ACTrieNode>
Represents and builds an AhoCorasickTrie.
AhoCorasickTrieFactory
A Factory to create AhoCorasickTries.
ClassTypeNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode>
A very powerful factory that can create any type of TrieNode which extends ACTrieNode using reflection.
Edge<T,​E>
A helper class representing a weighted edge.
KeywordTextMatcher
StringDictionaryMatcher implements the basic use case of the AhoCorasickTrie.
LanguageParameter
Stores global language parameters (alphabet characters, mapping function) needed in both AhoCorasick and Ukkonen's Algorithm.
LanguageParameterFactory
Factory to create LanguageParameters.
Match
A way to report matches found in a string.
UkkonenSCSFinder
An implementation of Esko Ukkonen's linear time algorithm for finding approximate shortest common superstrings.
UkkonenTrieNode
UkkonenTrieNode is a subclass of ACTrieNode which adds functionality (depth, supporters, bfsSuccessor) to the superclass in order to enable the use of Ukkonens Algorithm.
UkkonenTrieNodeFactory
Creates UkkonenTrieNodes, which support the implementation details needed for Ukkonens Linear Time SCS Finder.
